name: @kiali/kiali-ui
homepage-comment: *Do not* change this setting if you wish run Kiali under different server root.
Instead update 'web_root' in Kaili config map in OpenShift console.
author: Red Hat
script-comments: When adding new scripts, please be careful to using `npm run` instead of `yarn` for the tasks.
Some build environments we use do not include npm access, and installing yarn is not possible.

scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run build:kiali
scripts.build:kiali: npm run i18n && REACT_APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version REACT_APP_NAME=$npm_package_name rsbuild build
scripts.cypress: cypress open -e TAGS="@core-1 or @core-2 or @core-caching or @crd-validation or @perses or @ai-chatbot"
scripts.cypress:run: r=0; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/crd-validation -e TAGS="@crd-validation" || r=1; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/core -e TAGS="@core-1 or @core-2" || r=1; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/perses -e TAGS="@perses" || r=1; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/core-caching -e TAGS="@core-caching" || r=1; exit $r
scripts.cypress:run:ambient: r=0; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/ambient -e TAGS="@ambient" || r=1; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/waypoint -e TAGS="@waypoint" || r=1; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/waypoint-tracing -e TAGS="@waypoint-tracing" || r=1; exit $r
scripts.cypress:run:ambient-multi-primary: r=0; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/ambient-multi-primary -e TAGS="@ambient-multi-primary" || r=1; cypress run --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/waypoint-multicluster -e TAGS="@waypoint-multicluster" || r=1; exit $r
scripts.cypress:run:ambient:junit: r=0; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/ambient -e TAGS="@ambient" || r=1; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/waypoint -e TAGS="@waypoint" || r=1; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/waypoint-tracing -e TAGS="@waypoint-tracing" || r=1; exit $r
scripts.cypress:run:ambient-multi-primary:junit: r=0; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/ambient-multi-primary -e TAGS="@ambient-multi-primary" || r=1; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/waypoint-multicluster -e TAGS="@waypoint-multicluster" || r=1; exit $r
scripts.cypress:run:junit: r=0; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/crd-validation -e TAGS="@crd-validation" || r=1; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/core -e TAGS="@core-1 or @core-2" || r=1; cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json --config screenshotsFolder=cypress/screenshots/core-caching -e TAGS="@core-caching" || r=1; exit $r
scripts.cypress:run:multi-cluster:junit: cypress run --reporter cypress-multi-reporters --reporter-options configFile=reporter-config.json -e TAGS="@multi-cluster and not @multi-primary"
scripts.lint:precommit: unset GIT_DIR && git diff --cached --name-only HEAD --diff-filter=AM | grep -E '\.tsx?$' | cut -d'/' -f2- | xargs -r eslint -c eslint.config.precommit.mjs
scripts.pre-commit: yarn run pretty-quick --staged --no-restage --bail --pattern "**/*.{ts,tsx,scss,json}" && npm run lint:precommit && npm run lint:gherkin && npm run format:precommit
scripts.start:kiali: npm run i18n && REACT_APP_VERSION=$npm_package_version REACT_APP_NAME=$npm_package_name REACT_APP_GIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD) rsbuild dev
scripts.start:mock: npm run generate:chatbot-conversations && npm run msw:init && REACT_APP_MOCK_API=true npm run start:kiali
scripts.test: TZ=UTC tsc -p . && TZ=UTC TEST_RUNNER=1 rstest run
scripts.postinstall: find node_modules/@patternfly -name '*.css' -exec sed -i -e 's/justify-content: start;/justify-content: flex-start;/g' -e 's/align-items: start;/align-items: flex-start;/g' -e 's/justify-content: end;/justify-content: flex-end;/g' -e 's/align-items: end;/align-items: flex-end;/g' {} + && cypress install
